**📅 活动时间：**
2025/11/17 00:00~2025/12/28 23:59 (UTC+8)

**📌重要信息：**
UGC创作征集分为两个投稿方向，守密人可将作品按投稿要求发布在任意社群平台。
发布作品后，请务必把链接填到对应投稿方向的问卷！填写后才能参与后续评选和发奖。
✦同人投稿链接：https://wj.qookkagames.com/p/M31Tdkwd
✦攻略投稿链接：https://wj.qookkagames.com/p/qEjTwLZ9

**📅 Submission Period:**
2025/11/17 00:00~2025/12/28 23:59 (UTC+8)

**📌 Key Information:**
The UGC creation submission campaign is divided into two submission directions. 
You may post your work on any platform, but please make sure to submit your work via the official survey to qualify for rewards.
